title: AI workload governance and DLP
summary: Master the art of safeguarding sensitive data and enforcing governance for AI workloads on Azure. This learning path is crafted for IT and security professionals tasked with maintaining data protection and compliance in AI environments. Discover how to prevent data exfiltration and apply governance policies that ensure consistent, secure AI deployments. Learn to combine technical controls with strategic oversight to create resilient, policy-driven AI architectures that align with organizational and regulatory standards.

sections.title: AI workload governance and DLP

Learn to combine technical controls with strategic oversight to create resilient, policy-driven AI architectures that align with organizational and regulatory standards.

lessons.title: Prevent data exfiltration from Azure AI Workloads
lessons.content_md:
Overview of how to prevent data exfiltration for AI workloads running on Microsoft Azure.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/prevent-azure-machine-learning-data-exfiltration/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica AI workload governance and DLP
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **AI workload governance and DLP**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
